completed_tasks.name: Wave 0 — test contracts, image stubs, check-copy.sh, ci.yml
All Phase 1 section components (HeroSection through SiteFooter)
Frontend reset — deleted all section components, wired SEO emitters, added Nav/Footer stubs
Nav + Footer minimal visible implementation + global.css linked in app.html

remaining_tasks.name: Build out Nav.svelte with real content (logo, links, mobile menu)
Build out Footer.svelte with real content
Rebuild home page sections from scratch

decisions.decision: Full frontend reset — deleted all Phase 1 section components
decisions.rationale: User decided to start fresh visually rather than continue with existing implementations
New component names for the fresh start

decisions.decision: Head.svelte + JsonLd.svelte restored (SEO infrastructure, not visual)
decisions.rationale: SEO/AEO must remain wired on every route — these are not frontend components
Those routes still need basic content to avoid build failures
Was not linked anywhere — design tokens and fonts were not loading

decisions.decision: npm clean install — package-lock deleted and regenerated
decisions.rationale: @rolldown/pluginutils dist artifact was missing, causing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on build

next_action: Build Nav.svelte with real content — logo, navigation links, mobile hamburger menu. Refer to Figma design and CLAUDE.md for design tokens.
context_notes: Phase 1 was previously completed (all 9 plans done, CI passing), then reset by user decision. npm was also broken (missing @rolldown/pluginutils). Both fixed. Site now builds and serves cleanly with blank home page, Nav + Footer stubs (forest green bars), and all SEO tags emitting correctly on every route. Ready to rebuild frontend from blank slate.
